name: Stripe Revenue Tracker - Real Revenue to Knowledge Graph (Multi-Business)

const event = $('Parse Stripe Event').first().json;
return [{ json: { business_id: null, date: event.today, signups: 1, conversions: 1, revenue_direct: event.amount, channel: event.channel, _eventType: event.eventType, _subscriptionMrr: event.subscriptionMrr, _amount: event.amount, _businessIdFromEvent: event.businessId } }];
